purpose: Bucket split for the remaining parity-drift tail. Avoids treating every file as the same kind of .d.ts cleanup. Each bucket has a different fix strategy and different review-risk profile.

buckets.name: kernel-adjacent
buckets.description: WebGPU kernel wrappers. Declarations must match actual runtime signatures loosely but correctly — a bad .d.ts here is worse than a missing one because consumers get false confidence. Mirror the nearest-neighbor existing declaration in the same file.

files.action: declare each as matching pair runX/recordX — 12 symbols, 6 backward ops. Use existing backward/utils.d.ts runMatmulBackwardDx shape as template.
declare the backward-kernel factory plus the Dx matmul runner/recorder.
add to the grouped re-export of backward helpers.

buckets.name: converter-helpers
buckets.description: Converter-side utilities. Most are private-ish but consumed by the converter entry point, so runtime exports them. Declarations can be Record<string, unknown>-shaped — these don't have a stable public consumer yet.

files.action: add 6 loose declarations. isGemma4PerLayerEmbedTensor is a simple predicate.

buckets.name: inference-text-helpers
buckets.description: Layer and embedding helpers inside the text pipeline. Shape fits Record<string, unknown> at the boundary plus a small number of scalar-typed predicates.

files.action: 9 declarations. Predicate helpers (hasConvLayers, isSlidingLayerType, hasPerLayerInputBlock) are boolean returns on simple shapes.
3 add-declarations plus 2 stale-removals. Confirm recordScale/scaleGPUBuffer are not used by any consumer before deleting.

buckets.name: experimental-lane
buckets.description: Quarantined subsystem lane under src/experimental/. Lower priority: drift here affects developer-internal surfaces only. Safe to allowlist with short expiry rather than fix inline.

files.action: declare resolveEffectiveQuantizationInfo (same shape as src/converter/quantization-info — it's re-exported). Verify the 2 dts-stale stream helpers are not used and remove.
stale-removal. Verify no consumer references streamTensorData.

buckets.name: stale-removal-candidates
buckets.description: onlyInDts items where the runtime clearly does not export the symbol. Fix is to delete from .d.ts. Each needs a git-blame check that the symbol wasn't recently removed (so consumers haven't migrated yet).

files.action: verify no consumer imports streamShardRange (git log + grep) before deleting from .d.ts.

strategyNotes.cadence: Keep 3–5 files per commit. Small enough to review, easy to bisect.
strategyNotes.ciPromotion: Do NOT wire check:green into CI while parity still fails. The check should become boring before it becomes mandatory.
probes: run the parity checker (npm run exports:parity:check)
for public-surface changes, `node -e 'import("...").then(m => ...)'` to confirm runtime actually exports what the .d.ts claims
strategyNotes.pause: Do not advance docs/developer-guides collapse beyond the inventory artifacts until parity is mostly closed — the tail here directly affects public correctness.
